component.name: BG3 HonourMode Save Manager
component.summary: Manage and restore Baldur's Gate 3 HonourMode saves

description.p: A desktop app for managing Baldur's Gate 3 HonourMode saves. Browse all HonourMode runs, create labelled backups at any point, and restore any backup with an automatic safety backup beforehand.

ul.li: Browse all HonourMode runs and their backups
Create labelled backups at any point
Restore any backup with an automatic pre-restore safety backup
View save screenshots and party metadata
Profile editor to clear failed Honour Mode flags without starting over
